name: Pesto Sauce Deluxe
recipeInstructions:
1. If using Parmesan cheese, grate a hard variety and place in food processor.
2. Chop basil leaves finely and add to the food processor with chopped walnuts, minced garlic, and grated cheese.
3. Slowly pour in olive oil while the machine is running.
4. Continue blending until reaching the desired consistency.
5. Add black pepper to taste.
